image_14.jpg:
LAB's CFB PLAY 🧪
Iowa +5.5 -110 1U

Iowa head coach expects full roster to be a go facing
Vanderbilt. Iowa defense matches up great with a
Vanderbilt run heavy scheme that has scored 45 in
the last 3 games of the season. Vanderbilt will be
without TE Eli Stowers in this one which is a huge
blow to this offense as he was the leading receiver for
this Vanderbilt team.

Big fan of this Iowa defense that held Oregon to 18
points in a game that took a game winning field goal
for Oregon to not lose. They played Indiana very
tough as well. Iowa finished the season with a 18th
ranked SOS, which was slightly better than
Vanderbilts at 30th.

This Vanderbilt defense is one of the worst teams at
getting off the field on 3rd down in the Nation
allowing teams to covert on 3rd downs at a 43% rate
(107th) while Iowa is a top 50 team in the nation at
moving the chains. Vanderbilt defense has also
struggled to create turnovers on the season ranking
85th in the country in that category.

Iowa has been elite as a underdog this season (4-0)
and have been even better away from home (5-0)
ATS.

It is extremely important to note that this Indiana
team lost by 2 to Oregon, and had Indiana on the
ropes all game in a tough game. This defense is legit
and will be able to slow down this Vanderbilt offense
while also being able to keep moving the chains on

HOOPS

⚡
DETROIT PISTONS (-2.5) over LA LAKERS

(3-UNITS) 💰💰💰

7:40pm PST - NBC

Everyone is taking the Lakers because it’s LaBron’s
birthday. However, the Pistons are aware of that and
will be motivated offensively to score points as they
are coming off a 2-game losing streak and haven’t lost
three straight games all season long, plus the fact
they are coming off scoring only 99 points in their last
game which was their second lowest point total of
the season.

Remember, the Lakers have a bottom-five overall
defensive efficiency and come off only allowing 101
points to the Kings. Prior to that they allowed 119 to
the Rockets, 132 to the Suns and 135 to the Jazz in
three of their last four games!

The PISTONS are also 19-7 ATS as a FAVORITE this
season as well and we know that when the public
money is on LaBron James, the Lakers throw games
away. Not having Reeves could be missed tonight if
they are going to keep up with this Pistons team
tonight!

BOWL GAME SELECTION for TUESDAY 12/30
@everyone

⚡
MUSIC CITY BOWL

TENNESSEE/ILLINOIS

OVER 61.5 (-105)

(4-UNITS) 💰💰💰💰

2:30pm PST - ESPN

TENNESSEE is 6-2 to the OVER/UNDER as a
FAVORITE and ILLINOIS is 3-1 to the OVER/UNDER as
an UNDERDOG! Both defenses were very weak
against the pass and on third down this season and
these two quarterbacks in Altmyer and Aguilar were
very successful this season passing the football.

To make it even more worse for these defenses, they
won’t have a few starters during to opt-outs and
these two quarterbacks transfer portal. Tennessee
also won’t have a Defensive Coordinator for this game
as HC Josh Heupel fired Tim Banks and hired Jim
Knowles from Penn State for next season.

The TOTAL opened up at 59.5 and has since climbed
despite over 75% public tickets and public money on
the UNDER. There is still VALUE on the OVER here
under the key betting number of 63. 👀

(continued)

⚡
ALAMO BOWL

TCU (+7) good to (+6.5) over USC

(3-UNITS) 💰💰💰

6:00pm PST - ESPN

USC has their three top receivers and Tight End all
OUT for this game and even though TCU won’t have
Hoover at quarterback, HC Sonny Dykes has had
plenty of time to get his quarterbacks ready for this
game in which he may play two quarterbacks. This
was a TCU offense that was once one of the best
offenses in the country earlier this season and
perhaps this TCU team comes in aggressive
offensively against a USC defense that has been
suspect all season.

Remember, USC is 0-3 ATS in their last three games
and 1-4 ATS away from The Memorial Coliseum in LA.
This game is being played in the Alamodome in San
Antonio, TX which is technically a home game for
TCU being only 4 hours away! 👀

image_30.jpg:
PorterPicks 12:36 AM
BOWL GANE BONUS UNDERDOG SELECTION for
TUESDAY

⚡
MUSIC CITY BOWL

ILLINOIS (+3.5) over Tennessee

(4-UNITS) 💰💰💰💰

2:30pm PST - ESPN

The VOLS defense is atrocious! It’s that simple! They
allowed 28 ppg and close to 400 yards ppg. Illinois
quarterback Luke Altmyer is going to have plenty of
success moving the football up and down the field on
this Vols defense. The only reason why Tennessee is a
favorite in this game is because they represent the
SEC and the fact this game is being played in
Nashville, TN.

Illinois has played the more tougher strength of
schedule this season and keep in mind too that
Tennessee has only one victory over one team that’s
in a Bowl Game this season and that’s Mississippi
State who has a losing record. With Tennessee not
having a DC and the fact they are already a struggling
defense allowing a ton of yards and points, and the
fact the Vols are only 3-7 ATS in their last 10 games,
Illinois is the SHARP side in this Bowl Game,
especially catching points with the better defense.
